title: match against return: UnknownType: *ast.MatchAgainst
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!
If we don't support this syntax, please return a more firendly message.

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
```
drop table woonplaats_googliaans;
CREATE TABLE woonplaats_googliaans (
    woonplaats VARCHAR(100),
    FULLTEXT INDEX (woonplaats)
) ENGINE=InnoDB;

select * from woonplaats_googliaans dd WHERE MATCH(dd.woonplaats) AGAINST('+amsterdam*' IN BOOLEAN MODE);
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
results from mysql:
```
MySQL [testdb_1747813017112]> select * from woonplaats_googliaans dd WHERE MATCH(dd.woonplaats) AGAINST('+amsterdam*' IN BOOLEAN MODE);
Empty set (0.00 sec)
```

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

```
MySQL [testdb_1747813017112]> select * from woonplaats_googliaans dd WHERE MATCH(dd.woonplaats) AGAINST('+amsterdam*' IN BOOLEAN MODE);
ERROR 1105 (HY000): UnknownType: *ast.MatchAgainst
```
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)
```
MySQL [testdb_1747813017112]> select tidb_version();
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| tidb_version()                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Release Version: v8.5.1
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: fea86c8e35ad4a86a5e1160701f99493c2ee547c
Git Branch: HEAD
UTC Build Time: 2025-01-16 07:38:34
GoVersion: go1.23.4
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: tikv |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
1 row in set (0.01 sec)
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE woonplaats_googliaans (woonplaats VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT * FROM woonplaats_googliaans WHERE woonplaats LIKE '%amsterdam%';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM woonplaats_googliaans WHERE woonplaats IS NULL;
key_bug_features: MATCH against with BOOLEAN MODE causes UnknownType error
